summary: Iteration 68 - Roles & Permissions Follow-up Tests. Tested 5 new features: (1) Upload endpoints now allow operators with any CMS permission, (2) role_member revocation blocks My Account access immediately, (3) CMS Welcome page for operators without dashboard permission, (4) Members table 'Mentor' column rename, (5) Member edit form role dropdown removed. 14/15 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed.

minor.issue: Some members (john@example.com) missing is_mentor field - data migration issue for older records

issues: 404 Page not found - /home route may not exist, but navbar correctly shows Admin and My Account buttons

action_items: MINOR: Add is_mentor field to existing members via data migration or default value in API response
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 tested Roles & Permissions follow-up features. Carlos (operator) has role_member + Operador role (role_9ce1490309b3) with permissions: about, gallery_albums, pages. Upload endpoints (/api/upload, /api/upload-file) now use require_any_cms_access instead of require_admin. CMS Welcome page renders settings.cms_welcome HTML for operators without dashboard permission. Members table shows 'Mentor' column with YES/- values. Member edit form no longer has Admin/Member role dropdown.

upload_endpoints.details: POST /api/upload and /api/upload-file now accept operators with any CMS permission (previously returned 403 'Admin access required')

role_member_revocation.details: Removing role_member immediately blocks: default login (403 'My Account access has been revoked'), /member/login (403), /member/me (403 even with valid token). CMS login still works for operators.

cms_welcome_page.details: Operators without dashboard permission land on CmsWelcome page (data-testid='cms-welcome') showing settings.cms_welcome HTML content

settings_cms_welcome_field.details: Settings → General tab has CMS Welcome rich-text field (data-testid='settings-cms-welcome') with RichTextEditor

members_table_mentor_column.details: Column header renamed from 'Member Type' to 'Mentor', values show 'YES' (emerald badge) or '-'

member_edit_form_role_dropdown_removed.details: Personal tab no longer has Admin/Member role dropdown, email field spans full width

navbar_visibility.details: Operator with role_member sees both Admin and My Account buttons on website navbar

gallery_albums_operator_access.details: Carlos (operator with gallery_albums permission) can access /admin/gallery-albums and see Add Album button

admin_regression.details: Admin has full access to all sections, can update members without role dropdown
